name: Maryland Crab Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb String beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients except crabmeat into a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil and cover the pot.
3. Simmer for about 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Add crabmeat gradually throughout cooking.
5. Use leftover claw and backfin meat if available for added sweetness.
